articles.description: Quote of the day by Leonardo da Vinci: The renowned Renaissance artist and thinker, cautioned against the perils of personal opinions. He believed our own beliefs can be the greatest deception, distorting reality. The article emphasizes the importance of questioning our viewpoints. This encourages intellectual humility, leading to clearer thinking about ourselves and the world.

articles.title: Iran Says It Has ‘No Trust’ In US After Trump Xi Talks, Hormuz Tensions Remain High
articles.description: Just hours after US President Donald Trump concluded talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping, Iran signalled deep mistrust toward Washington amid stalled ceasefire negotiations. Speaking in New Delhi, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi said Tehran would continue negotiations only if the US showed seriousness toward diplomacy. He also confirmed Pakistan mediated talks remain stalled while warning Iran is prepared to return to fighting if diplomacy collapses. The remarks come as tensions continue around the Strait of Hormuz, one of the world’s most critical oil shipping routes.

articles.title: ‘You dropped charges of a murderer?’: Van Drew brutally grills Fairfex attorney over immigrant case
articles.description: Rep. Jeff Van Drew erupted during a fiery congressional hearing as he grilled Fairfax County Commonwealth’s Attorney Steve Descano over allegations that prosecutors dropped or reduced charges involving undocumented immigrant suspects tied to violent crimes. Van Drew repeatedly demanded answers, asking if Descano could “look grieving mothers in the eye” after families accused the prosecutor’s office of failing victims.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Albert Einstein: 'The world is a dangerous place to live; not because of the...'- The Greatest scientist's powerful warning about silence, courage and the danger of doing nothing
articles.description: Albert Einstein's powerful words highlight the danger of silence. He stated that evil thrives not just from wrongdoers but from those who do nothing. This message remains relevant today, urging individuals to act against injustice. Einstein's legacy extends beyond science, emphasizing moral responsibility. His warning encourages courage to break silence when it becomes dangerous.

articles.title: Paranjpe was inducted in Shiv Sena to stop him from joining MVA; NCP was kept in loop: Uday Samant
articles.description: Former NCP leader Anand Paranjpe has joined the Shiv Sena. Maharashtra minister Uday Samant revealed the move was to keep Paranjpe from joining opposition parties. The NCP, led by Sunetra Pawar, was informed about the induction. This was done to prevent any misunderstandings within the ruling Mahayuti alliance. Paranjpe previously left the Shiv Sena and later joined the NCP.

articles.title: BIG BREAKING: MP High Court Indore Bench to deliver verdict on Bhojshala dispute today at 2:30 PM
articles.description: The Madhya Pradesh High Court’s Indore Bench is set to deliver a crucial verdict today at around 2:30 PM on the long-standing Bhojshala dispute in Dhar. The site is claimed by Hindu, Muslim, and Jain groups, with Hindu पक्ष identifying it as a Saraswati temple, Muslim Party as Kamal Maula mosque, and Jain community also presenting its claim. The case includes findings from an ASI survey and extensive court hearings, after which the judgment was reserved. Currently, Bhojshala sees a unique arrangement where Hindu prayers are held on Tuesdays and Muslim prayers on Fridays. Ahead of the verdict, heavy security measures have been deployed across Dhar, including police deployment, drone surveillance, and Section 163 to prevent any law-and-order situation. Authorities are on high alert to ensure peace regardless of the court’s decision

articles.title: India can play long-term mediator role: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov on Iran-US conflict
articles.description: Russia's Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov proposed India as a mediator for the Iran-US conflict. He highlighted India's extensive diplomatic experience and its role as BRICS chair. Lavrov suggested India could facilitate dialogue between Iran and its Arab neighbours to prevent regional instability. India's past mediation efforts in various global conflicts were also noted.

articles.title: Keir Starmer to be ousted as UK PM? How a leadership challenge could unfold
